title: erigeron × trachselii
intro: Erigeron × trachselii, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating skin irritations and wounds, due to its flavonoid and sesquiterpene content. Alpine Fleabane can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used for its medicinal purposes, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
